 Ziziphus jujuba is a deciduous shrub or small tree with edible fruit, providing nutrition and health benefits to those who consume it. The health benefits of Ziziphus jujuba include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-aging properties, which may help to protect against various diseases, including cardiovascular and neurodegenerative disorders. The bioactive constituents of Ziziphus jujuba include flavonoids, phenolic acids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ziziphus jujuba include teas, extracts, and dried fruits, which are used to promote relaxation, improve sleep, and support immune function.
